title: More Immersive Skyblock Pack
description: Perhaps the best Hypixel Skyblock modpack?
body:
### Description
 All-inclusive, **lightweight** modpack with essential Skyblock features and niche additions like a **second chat** to separate NPC/party messages from general chat.

**Use at your own risk** – not all mods are endorsed by Hypixel, so avoid using any features that could be considered bannable.

### Features Include 
1. Multitude of Skyblock-specific enhancements and overlays.
2. Dual chat system for separating NPC/Party messaged from general messages.
2. Increased FPS and smoother performance.
3. Scrollable item tooltips for long descriptions.
4. Fullbright.
5. Clean, customizable HUD and crosshair.
6. Borderless fullscreen.
7. Sprint toggle for easier movement  

### More mods were meant to be included in this pack but redistribution is forbidden 
- Optifine - [https://optifine.net/downloads](https://optifine.net/downloads) [For custom weapons and better performance]
- Memory Fix - [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/memory-fix-1-8-9](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/memory-fix-1-8-9) [For better performace]
